creator: bokutin@bokut.in
text:
https://www.freshports.org/commit.php?category=math&port=p5-Math-GSL&files=yes&message_id=202006051028.055ASD71092072@repo.freebsd.org

We have confirmed that we can build math/p5-Algorithm-KMeans and audio/p5-Audio that have been erased because of this dependency.
I use math/p5-Algorithm-KMeans as well, so it would be nice to get them back in the tree again.
